mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO users (openid, union_id, nickname, avatar_url, gender, phone, status, last_login_time) VALUES
(#{user.openid}, #{user.unionId}, #{user.nickname}, #{user.avatarUrl}, #{user.gender}, #{user.phone}, #{user.status}, #{user.lastLoginTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE last_login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status = 1 ORDER BY last_login_time DESC
